sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2026-03-19 09:38
- Distance: 5.3 km
- Moving time: 30:13
- Elapsed time: 30:33
- Elevation gain: 103.8 m
- Average heart rate: 168.9 bpm
- Max heart rate: 184 bpm
- Average watts: 229.6 W
- Average speed: 10.6 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `240` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `170.1 bpm`, ranging from `96.0` to `184.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `168.2 bpm` and second-half average HR was `172.1 bpm` (+3.9 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `163.1 spm`, with a working range of `100.0` to `194.0 spm` after excluding `7` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `167.5 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `156.8 spm` (-10.8 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:40 /km` across `5.335 km` in `30:13` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:14 /km` and second-half pace was `6:04 /km` (+50 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `168.9 bpm` average and `184 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `165.5 bpm` in the first half and `171.8 bpm` in the second (+6.3 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `30:13` out of `30:33` elapsed (98.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `10` stop segments and `2.1%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `109.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `37.8 m` and `64.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `40.8 m` in the first half and `68.2 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
